3137370.name: Trap with Furry Femboy
3137370.description:
You are not alone there.....

You wake up and realize that there is furry femboy, You realize it's not a dream.....

Don't try to escape or otherwise.....

The Main Gameplay

This game featuring cute femboy furry! (that much scarier) chase you while during trying to escape, You have to collect sock which will make game more difficult as you collect more.

While trying to escape, you have ability to use an item to keep yourself safe. because there is also entity more than just femboy furry roaming around map trying to stop you................. more than just you and the femboy furry.....

Try not get caught....

Featuring Multiple Gamemode and CHAO!

While normal gamemode is short and not really that easy but there is multiple gamemode you can try! like hard and chao mode for you to challenge..... maybe?

And.... Bouns Content!

Inspired by popular classic dressing game. (that very popular last year)

Dress your pet as you like! with 6 set of each 6 type of catalog.

And.... Bouns Content!

Dress your pet as you like! with 6 set of each 6 type of catalog.
